scripts.build: bun run --filter '@blue.ts/core' build && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/auth' build && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/logging' build && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/middleware' build && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/create' build
scripts.build:types: bun run --filter '@blue.ts/core' build:types && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/auth' build:types && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/logging' build:types && bun run --filter '@blue.ts/middleware' build:types
